content.en:
"First of all, slowly comprehend the great power of space - the spear of the Hell Divine Sky, the text of the Heavenly Dao of the Void is too rare, it is luck to be able to get one this time, it is almost unrealistic to want to get a few more, I can only slowly comprehend the spear of the hell divine sky, and there is only this way at present!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following days, Ye Tian practiced in retreat honestly, and while comprehending the great supernatural powers of space, he also practiced in other aspects.

His current combat power has reached an incredible level, if he divides His Supreme Highness into ranks, he is definitely the top category, but even so, Ye Tian does not dare to immediately impact the True God level.

He was going to improve his strength a little more so that he could deal with the True God-level Thunder Tribulation.

Next, Ye Tian's main goal was to compress the immortal power, perfect the secret techniques of the Mixed Yuan Scale Armor, and perfect the Heavenly Moon Sword.

Although Ye Tian has created a pinnacle-level sword path mastery-Tianyue Knife, if today's Moon Dao is far from reaching the level of the strongest peak-level sword path mastery, and Ye Tian is the strongest sword, if he does not perfect the Tianyue Sword to the strongest peak-level sword path mastery, this sword path mastery is a little imperfect.

And in order to create the strongest peak-level sword path mastery, Ye Tian also needs to meet one condition, that is, to condense his own sword law origin.

Once he reached this level, even if he was in the area of law isolation, Ye Tian would be able to exert the power of the Heavenly Moon Sword.

There are also many sword path treasures suitable for sword path powerhouses to participate in the Xuan-level area, although it is not of much help to Ye Tian, but Ye Tian still often goes to comprehend, plus he browses a large number of sword path classic cheats and so on, Ye Tian's knife path is steadily improving.

However, the speed of progress is still too slow, and it is still far from perfecting the sword path mastery to the strongest level of the peak level.

"If only I could enter the sword mound again!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But this can only be thought about, even the inheritance Daozi of the nine supreme forces can only enter the sword mound once, and he is naturally not allowed to enter the sword mound again.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to perfect the Tianyue Sword to the strongest peak-level sword path peerless level in a short period of time, he also needed other opportunities.

In the following days, Ye Tian went back to Earth.

This time, he mainly left Heavenly Dao Mu Xin in the Heavenly Pavilion, and raised the talents of several important members of the Heavenly Pavilion to the Chaos level cultivation talent one by one.

Any genius who has a Chaos level cultivation talent can cultivate to the Domination Realm in the future.

And half of the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart can cast a total of five Chaos Level Cultivation Talents, that is to say, in addition to him, the Heavenly Pavilion can give birth to five Masters in the future.

It is also very rare for the entire human race to have five dominant forces.

It can be said that the half-cut Heavenly Dao Wood Heart has instantly raised the foundation of the Heavenly Pavilion by many grades.

this day.

Ye Tian had just stayed on the earth for a short time, and when he was about to leave, an old man came to the earth.

"Yunxi!"

Ye Tian saw Yun Xi in front of him, and recalled various scenes from the past in his mind.

Speaking of which, he and Yun Xi were only in a cooperative relationship at the beginning, but the two were barely friends.

I thought that there would be no chance to meet in the future, but I didn't expect Yunxi to come to Earth.

"I've seen His Highness Wanfa!"

Yun Xi saw Ye Tian and bent down.

Although there was a smile on her face, there was a hint of sadness and urgency in her smile.

Obviously, Yun Xi did not come to Earth this time to reminisce, but to ask for help.

At this time, although Yun Xi was already a god-level powerhouse of the fifth order of the god level, the gap was too big compared to Ye Tian, and the status of the two of them was not the same as before.

In the past, Yun Xi was the eldest lady of the Yun family in the galaxy, and Ye Tian was just a Tianjiao, with no background.

But now, Ye Tiannai is the famous Wanfa His Highness of the Human Race, and his status is even comparable to that of the master, but Yun Xi's status is still like that.

Therefore, Yun Xi had a lot of restraints in the face of Ye Tian, and was even very nervous.

"Yunxi, let's say, what's the matter with coming to Earth?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yun Xi gritted her teeth and told the things one by one.

It turned out that more than a hundred years ago, Yun Xi obtained very superior results in a competition of the major branches of the Yun family with the strength of the eight-star peerless Tianjiao, and finally let the Yun family of the Milky Way return to the Ganges River system.

But Yun Xi, the Yun family's branch, is weak after all, and it can't compete with the Panyun Xingyun family of the Ganga River at all, and even among the many branches, Yun Xi's branch is also very weak.

Therefore, the Yunxi branch can only unite with other Yun family branches and report to each other.

However, not long ago, the Immortal Clan's plan began to be fully implemented, and it began to transform from the highest supreme-level force, dominant-level force, and overlord-level force step by step to the lower forces.

And the Panyun Xingyun family is also a pseudo-eight-star force, so the Panyun Xingyun family has become the first Yun family branch to transform the immortal clan among the many branches of the Yun family.

After the Panyun Xingyun family was transformed into an immortal clan, its strength soared, and god-level powerhouses continued to appear.

Because the Panyun Xingyun family has many powerhouses at the peak of the true god level, just because the talent is not enough, although there is no way to be promoted to the great god level.

And now, they have transformed into the Immortal Clan, and a very small number of True God-level peak powerhouses have their talents raised to a higher level, so they have instantly stepped into the ranks of the Great God-level powerhouses.

With many great god levels, the Yun family also met the requirements of the eight-star force and was successfully promoted to the eight-star force.

What's more, one of the ancestors of the Yun family luckily stepped into the galaxy level and suddenly became a pseudo-nine-star force.

There are not many galaxy-level powerhouses in the Panyun Xingyun family, and they can't meet the requirements for promotion to the nine-star force in a short period of time.

So.

The Panyun Xingyun family wants to annex other Yun family branches, so as to integrate the entire Yun family, and make the Panyun family Yun family a real nine-star force.

If the Panyun Xingyun family is friendly, it would be fine, but the Panyun Xingyun family and Yun Xi's vein have a great hatred, and put forward very harsh conditions, so that Yun Xi's ancestor Yun Lao San bowed and kowtowed and kowtowed to admit his mistakes, so that Yun Xi's branch was allowed to survive and merge into the Yun family, otherwise the Yun Xi branch would be destroyed.

But in fact, it is more likely that the Panyun Xingyun family will destroy Yun Xi's branch, and the so-called kowtow to admit his mistake is just a deliberate humiliation.

Yun Lao knew very well that this branch could not compete with the Panyun Xingyun family at all, and even the many branches of the Yun family could not compete with each other.

Because the Panyun Xingyun family gave birth to a galaxy-level power, the other Yun family branches could not fight at all, and there was only a dead end to forcibly resist.

So, Yun Lao let Yun Xi come to Earth and ask Tiange for help.

Really, it was to ask Ye Tian for help.

It's just that Yun Lao didn't know where Ye Tian was, so he could only come to Tiange.

Yun Xi's luck was good, and Ye Tian happened to be in the Heavenly Pavilion.

"Your Highness Wanfa, please save our Yun family! The ancestor said that you are the envoy of the town domain, even the Panyun Xingyun family can't help you. If you are willing to make a move, our Yun family will be able to survive! If you have any requests, the Yun family and I will agree!"

Yun Xi bowed and prayed.
